code:
import io
import string

fn is_whitespace(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut evens_empty = true
mut odds_empty = true

mut i = 0
mut token = ""

while i <= n
  mut b = 0
  mut have_byte = false
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
      have_byte = true
    when None
      have_byte = false
    end
  end

  mut at_boundary = true
  if have_byte
    at_boundary = is_whitespace(b)
  end

  if at_boundary
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      mut parsed = 0
      mut ok = false
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        parsed = v
        ok = true
      when None
        ok = false
      end

      if ok
        if parsed % 2 == 0
          if evens_empty
            evens = "#{parsed}"
            evens_empty = false
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{parsed}"
          end
        else
          if odds_empty
            odds = "#{parsed}"
            odds_empty = false
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{parsed}"
          end
        end
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
